flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Jacksonville College-Main Campus rose 49% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.9k → $8.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Jacksonville College-Main Campus rose 49% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.9k → $8.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Jacksonville College-Main Campus fell 43% between 2021 and 2024 (58.8% → 33.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Jacksonville College-Main Campus fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (227 → 157).
